race.comment: ASTERN EFFORT (7) has placed three of four over this distance range and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be playing a major role in the finish. CASTLEREAGH AFFAIR (9) is facing the starter for the first time but has looked handy winning both trials and is sure to be well-educated out of the Bruce yard. Respect any market moves. TURBO TORQUE (17) has placed two from two around this circuit and gets Thompson on board from the low draw. Among the leading prospects. PEARLS IN JUNE (14) resumes here but has tuned up for this with two recent trials and may run a big race while fresh. SOLOACT (4) next best on debut.
